findings.source_excerpt: in every class except broomstick riding
findings.target_excerpt: trong mọi môn trừ bay chổng
findings.description: Typo: 'bay chổng' is meaningless here ('chổng' = upside-down/sticking up). 'broomstick riding' should be 'bay chổi' (flying broom).
findings.suggested_fix: trong mọi môn trừ bay chổi

findings.source_excerpt: please consider blogging it or tweeting it. A work like this only does as much good as there are people who read it.
findings.target_excerpt: xin hãy cân nhắc việc viết blog...
findings.description: The paragraph trails off with '...' and omits the rest of the source: 'or tweeting it' and the entire final sentence 'A work like this only does as much good as there are people who read it.'
findings.suggested_fix: xin hãy cân nhắc việc viết blog hoặc tweet về nó. Một tác phẩm như thế này chỉ mang lại lợi ích tương xứng với số người đọc nó.

findings.source_excerpt: who didn't know what a logarithm was
findings.target_excerpt: vì không biết logarithm là gì
findings.description: The English word 'logarithm' is left untranslated in Vietnamese prose; the standard Vietnamese term is 'logarit'.
findings.suggested_fix: vì không biết logarit là gì

findings.source_excerpt: What warm!Harry thinks is often meant as a good pattern to follow
findings.target_excerpt: Những gì Harry suy nghĩ thường được xem như một khuôn mẫu tốt để noi theo
findings.description: The 'warm!' qualifier on 'warm!Harry' is dropped, losing the deliberate contrast the author draws with the 'less warm characters' mentioned later in the same passage.
findings.suggested_fix: Những gì Harry-phiên-bản-ấm-áp suy nghĩ thường được xem như một khuôn mẫu tốt để noi theo

summary: Generally faithful translation with two solid defects (the 'bay chổng' typo for 'bay chổi' and a truncated final paragraph that drops the closing sentence) plus two minor/uncertain issues (untranslated 'logarithm' and the dropped 'warm!' qualifier).
